title: Starfish
original_title: एक प्रकार की मछली जिस को पाँच - सात बाहु के सदृश अंग होते है
overview: A skilled commercial diver in Malta, Tara Salgaonkar is a mystery to everyone around her. A strong girl who defies social conventions, she is trying to come to terms with her dark past.
